message:
test(robot,scan,docs): make binary-backed integration checks work under cargo test

The release gate was still failing after the functional fix because two
integration test files tried to spawn dcg from paths that do not exist under
this repository's `/tmp/cargo-target` setup, and one doctest snippet referenced
an undefined variable. This commit aligns those harnesses with the rest of the
suite so the documented and tested execution paths are actually runnable.

- teach `robot_mode` and `scan_extractor_integration` to resolve the dcg binary
  from `CARGO_BIN_EXE_dcg` or the integration test's sibling target path instead
  of assuming a repo-local release/debug binary exists
- preserve the `DCG_BIN` override for scan tests so explicit external binaries
  can still be injected when desired
- fix the panic formatting in `robot_mode` after switching to `PathBuf`
- define the `files` example variable in `src/output/progress.rs` so the doctest
  compiles during the full `cargo test` gate

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
